allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'src'\); import config; print\('Modi:', list\(config.MODES.keys\(\)\)\); print\('Default:', config.DEFAULT_MODE\); print\('Config-Pfad:', config.config_path\(\)\); print\('Roundtrip-Test:'\); enc = config.dpapi_encrypt\('sk-test-dummy-key-12345'\); print\('  verschlüsselt \(Base64-Länge\):', len\(enc\)\); dec = config.dpapi_decrypt\(enc\); print\('  entschlüsselt:', dec\); assert dec == 'sk-test-dummy-key-12345', 'Roundtrip fehlgeschlagen'; print\('  OK'\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 ; Write-Output "=== /health \(3 Versuche\) ===" ; 1..3 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("--- Versuch " + $_ + " ---"\) ; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:17321/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2\).Content ; Write-Output "OK" } catch { Write-Output \("FEHLER: " + $_.Exception.Message\) } ; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 })
